sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# At state 6, white lower region is gone. Level not completed.
# The only actions from state 6 are clicking blue blocks (self-loop or back to state 5).
# Let me try clicking on other elements: charcoal block, yellow strip, black bar, etc.

# Current segmentation summary
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Try clicking on the charcoal block (center: row 46, col 59)
print("\nTrying click on charcoal block at (46, 59):")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 46, 'col': 59}], intent='solve')
print(f"  gameplay_changed={last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}, board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
print(f"  level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 16:
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Charcoal now at cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break

print(f"\nCurrent state: {state_graph.current}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
